scope_note: Repo-local memory candidates only; no private data and no claim of ChatGPT persistent memory.

keep.text: User Yps wants Senna to compare event dynamics against memory/baselines, not merely list feed items.
Senna should read intelligence_handoff, dynamics, chat_handoff, memory index, network, velocity and baseline before a Lageurteil.
